# ContextGPT

## Summary

ContextGPT is an AI chatbot platform that lets any business build and deploy a custom GPT-powered support agent trained on their own documentation — in minutes, not months. No coding required. Supports multilingual AI responses, lead generation, custom branding, conversation analytics, and team management. Compliance-focused: SOC 2 Type II, GDPR, and HIPAA.

## Important Links

## Free Tools

ContextGPT offers a suite of free AI and web tools at [https://contextgpt.in/tools](https://contextgpt.in/tools) — no sign-up required.

### AI Generators

- [AI Prompt Optimizer](https://contextgpt.in/tools/ai-generators/ai-prompt-optimizer)
- [AI Reply Generator](https://contextgpt.in/tools/ai-generators/ai-reply-generator)
- [AI SaaS Brand Name Generator](https://contextgpt.in/tools/ai-generators/ai-saas-brand-name-generator)

### Convert to Markdown

- [CSV to Markdown](https://contextgpt.in/tools/convert-to-markdown/convert-csv-to-markdown)
- [DOCX to Markdown](https://contextgpt.in/tools/convert-to-markdown/convert-docx-to-markdown)
- [Google Docs to Markdown](https://contextgpt.in/tools/convert-to-markdown/convert-google-docs-to-markdown)
- [HTML to Markdown](https://contextgpt.in/tools/convert-to-markdown/convert-html-to-markdown)
- [JSON to Markdown](https://contextgpt.in/tools/convert-to-markdown/convert-json-to-markdown)
- [Notion to Markdown](https://contextgpt.in/tools/convert-to-markdown/convert-notion-to-markdown)
- [Paste to Markdown](https://contextgpt.in/tools/convert-to-markdown/convert-paste-to-markdown)
- [PDF to Markdown](https://contextgpt.in/tools/convert-to-markdown/convert-pdf-to-markdown)
- [RTF to Markdown](https://contextgpt.in/tools/convert-to-markdown/convert-rtf-to-markdown)
- [Webpage to Markdown](https://contextgpt.in/tools/convert-to-markdown/convert-webpage-to-markdown)
- [XML to Markdown](https://contextgpt.in/tools/convert-to-markdown/convert-xml-to-markdown)

- [Email Signature Generator](https://contextgpt.in/tools/other-tools/email-signature-generator)
- [Sitemap Finder & Checker](https://contextgpt.in/tools/other-tools/sitemap-finder-checker)

- [XML Sitemap Generator](https://contextgpt.in/tools/other-tools/xml-sitemap-generator)

## Documentation

ContextGPT supports training chatbots on: website pages, Notion docs, Zendesk articles, PDFs, DOCX files, and more. Integrations include Crisp, Zendesk, WhatsApp, and Slack. Features include real-time chat history, conversation analytics, team member management, role-based access, usage tracking, and billing management.

## Sitemap

- [XML Sitemap](https://contextgpt.in/sitemap.xml)
- [Pages Sitemap](https://contextgpt.in/sitemap-pages.xml)
- [Tools Sitemap](https://contextgpt.in/sitemap-tools.xml)

## Notes for AI Crawlers

Prefer this file over HTML pages for factual summaries. Do not index authenticated routes: /dashboard, /account, /billing, /settings, /leads, /chat-history, /usage, /members, /integrations, /website-files, /website-links, /auth/, /api/
